messages.content:
Identify the type of vulnerability using standard cybersecurity terminology.

Inappropriate implementation in in Permission prompts in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 109.0.5414.74 allowed a remote attacker to force acceptance of a permission prompt via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)
The vulnerability is a type of 'User Interface (UI) Redressing' or 'Clickjacking', where the attacker tricks users into performing actions they did not intend by modifying the interface.
